selection_goal: 100 high-acuity Seoul emergency-call cases where hospital capability, travel time, congestion, ICU/OR/CT/cath availability, or bypass tradeoffs make the OR ranking meaningful.
selection_criteria: Prefer cardiac arrest, respiratory compromise, altered consciousness/stroke, seizure, severe bleeding, chest pain/cardiac risk, major trauma/head injury, acute abdomen, obstetric/special-population, and high-acuity medical cases.
Prefer urgency 상/중, triage 응급증상/잠재응급증상, and disasterMedium 심정지/질병(중증).
Deprioritize routine transport, mild fever/cold, administrative calls, and calls dominated by location collection without meaningful clinical detail.

selection_method.topup_scope: Only files in the first six agent index ranges were used for the 10-case top-up; no additional agent wave was spawned.

privacy_note: raw/ contains original selected JSON files from the local source dataset. gold_cases.json and gold_cases.jsonl omit address, gender, audioPath, and raw recordId fields and redact common phone/id-number patterns in utterance text.
